data.content: Shipment finalized: verified fix commit a3b7a2dce9c4b1b14441a7f61fefe30cf1c573c6 is present on main and origin/main, re-ran retakes pagination and beads layout unit tests (pass), confirmed latest remote CI runs for main head cc33150b8be0aaa8ecd2926dd5a3cde26b357434 are successful, and confirmed push state is up-to-date.
